name: UEVR Webhooks
author: Bluscream (bluscream_)
short: Monitors specific forums for UEVR Profiles and triggers external webhooks.
description: Watches configured Discord channels for new messages containing archive attachments. When detected, dispatches notifications to Discord Webhooks, Home Assistant Webhooks, and GitHub Repository Dispatches.
install_msg: UEVR Webhooks installed! Configure your webhooks using `[p]uevrwebhooks` commands.
